path_and_reason_header: Review path: team + external multi-model (team: review-a3f7b2c1; reviewers: 2 native + 2 external)
report:
## Code Review Report

### Reviewed: main..HEAD
### Date: 2026-04-26

---

### Overall Verdict: FAIL

| Reviewer | Verdict | Findings |
|----------|---------|----------|
| Craftsmanship (code-reviewer) | WARN | 1 medium |
| Security (security-reviewer) | FAIL | 1 high |
| Codex (codex-review-prompter) | FAIL | 1 high |
| Gemini (gemini-review-prompter) | WARN | 1 medium |

---

### HIGH Findings

**SQL injection risk in searchUsers** (security, raised_by: security-reviewer [native-team], codex-review-prompter [external])
- File: src/users/repository.ts, symbol: searchUsers
- The searchUsers function uses raw string concatenation in SQL queries.

---

### MEDIUM Findings

**Missing null check in getUserById** (correctness, raised_by: code-reviewer [native-team])
- File: src/users/service.ts, symbol: getUserById

**Input validation gap in createUser** (security, raised_by: gemini-review-prompter [external])
- File: src/users/service.ts, symbol: createUser

---

### What's Done Well

- Good separation of concerns in the user service layer
- Security-relevant operations are centralized

---

### Summary

Two high-confidence cross-reviewer findings: SQL injection risk confirmed by both native security reviewer and Codex. Recommend addressing HIGH findings before merge.

findings.title: SQL injection risk in searchUsers
findings.description: The searchUsers function uses raw string concatenation in SQL queries.

findings.title: Missing null check in getUserById
findings.description: The getUserById function does not check for null before accessing user.email.

findings.title: Input validation gap in createUser
findings.description: The createUser function does not validate required fields.
